name: Prof. Deo Prakash Vidyarthi
title: Professor
institution: School of Computer and Systems Sciences, Jawaharlal Nehru University (JNU), New Delhi
researchArea: Distributed Systems, Grid/Cloud Computing, Mobile Computing, Mobile Agent Security, Evolutionary Algorithms
bio: Dr. Deo Prakash Vidyarthi is a Professor in the School of Computer and Systems Sciences at Jawaharlal Nehru University (JNU), New Delhi. He has over 25 years of research and teaching experience in the fields of distributed systems, evolutionary algorithms, and mobile computing. He has published numerous research papers in peer-reviewed journals and is a senior member of professional bodies.

name: Dr. Pooja Vashisth
title: Associate Professor (Teaching Stream)
institution: Department of Electrical Engineering & Computer Science, York University, Canada
researchArea: Recommender Systems, Machine Learning, Computer Science Education
bio: Dr. Pooja Vashisth is an Associate Professor (teaching stream) in the Department of Electrical Engineering & Computer Science, York University. Formerly Assistant Professor at the University of Toronto. Awarded Best College Teacher by the Delhi state government in 2017-18. Holds triple master's degrees (MCA, M.Phil, and M.Tech) in CS and completed Ph.D. from the University of Delhi.

name: Dr. Archana Pandita
title: Assistant Professor, Department of Computer Science
institution: School of Engineering, Architecture & Interior Design (EAID), Amity University Dubai, UAE
bio: Dr. Archana Pandita is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science at Amity University Dubai, UAE. She has over 12 years of international teaching experience, with research interests focused on Cloud Computing and Machine Learning.
